---
title: "Commodore James Goodenough R. N."
---

## Commodore James Goodenough R. N.

**Dates:** (d. 1875)

### Description

captain of H. M. S. Pearl

### Biography

He died on 20 August 1875 after being wounded by an arrow in the Santa Cruz Islands on 12 August, as reported in the <i>Morning Post</i> (18 October 1875).

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 24th [1875][[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
